query:
INSERT INTO messages (
                id, conversation_id, seq, role, content, raw_provider_payload, usage
            )
            VALUES (
                $1,
                $2,
                (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(seq), -1) + 1 FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = $2),
                $3,
                $4,
                $5,
                $6
            )
            RETURNING seq
